name: getTableStructure
description: Returns detailed structure for a table in a Google Document, including row/column counts and extracted cell text.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

tableId.description: The MCP table ID returned by listDocumentTables, for example "table:body:0".

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to inspect. If not specified, inspects the first tab or legacy document body.
